channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: NYC Council speaker concerned about deportation plans
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- New York City Council Speaker Adrienne Adams has concerns about Mayor Eric Adams' goal to deport migrants who commit violent crimes in the city. Mayor Adams met with incoming border czar Tom Homan on Thursday to discuss President-elect Donald Trump’s plans for mass deportations.
item.dc:creator: Dan Mannarino, PIX 11

item.title: Texas AG sues New York doctor for providing abortion pills across state lines
item.description: Both surgical and medication abortions are banned in Texas, and Friday’s lawsuit is the first legal test to see what happens when state abortion laws conflict with one another.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Expanding college financial aid will help Texas meet workforce needs, new higher ed chief says
item.description: In his new role, Rosser will be responsible for helping Texas meet its goal to increase the number of Texans ages 25 to 34 with a postsecondary credential to 60% by 2030.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Sneha Dey, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump posts 'how it's going' message contrasting Time Person of the Year cover with mugshot
item.description: President-elect Trump posted a tongue-in-cheek "how it started, how it's going" post on his Truth Social network Friday after he was named Time's Person of the Year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senior Trump official reveals visit that set ‘trajectory’ for election victory
item.description: President-elect Trump was hosted at East Palestine by Sen. JD Vance shortly after the derailment disaster, which Steven Cheung agreed was when his trajectory to victory began.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Drone experts rule out US government experiment, unsure of other New Jersey drone phenomenon theories
item.description: Drone experts have little idea what the dozens of drone sightings over New Jersey could be, but have ruled out the possibility that they might be the work of a classified government program.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump team rejects Bragg's 'Dark Dream Scenario' for hush money case
item.description: President-elect Trump’s attorneys condemned Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg’s (D) suggested alternatives to dismissing Trump’s hush money criminal conviction, going as far to call one of them “unhinged” and “absurd” Friday.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nancy Pelosi hospitalized after she 'sustained an injury' from fall on official trip to Luxembourg
item.description: Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi has been hospitalized after she “sustained an injury” during an official engagement in Luxembourg, according to a spokesman.
item.dc:creator: Mary Clare Jalonick, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: A nonprofit leader, a social worker: Here are the stories of the people on Biden's clemency list
item.description: Among the roughly 1,500 people whose sentences were commuted or who were pardoned by President Joe Biden are a nonprofit leader who supports at-risk youth, a social worker who fosters animals and a postdoctoral researcher One woman who received a pardon said she wanted people with drug addiction to
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Minnesota cities take different approaches to recreational cannabis market
item.description: The Minnesota Legislature set most of the rules about cultivation and sale of recreational marijuana in spring 2023. However, the state left several key decisions within local control, including whether cities can allow more than a set minimum of shops.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Yang, MPR News

item.title: Mitt Romney's Senate exit may create a vacuum of vocal, conservative Trump critics
item.description: Sen. Mitt Romney has given his final remarks after seeing the Republican Party for which he was once the standard bearer drastically transform under Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Schoenbaum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Biden administration makes final diplomatic push for stability across a turbulent Mideast
item.description: AQABA, Jordan (AP) — Top U.S. officials were in the Middle East on Thursday, pushing for stability in Syria and an end to Israel’s 14-month war in the Gaza Strip in a last-ditch diplomatic push by the outgoing Biden administration before President-elect Donald Trump takes office in a few weeks.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE and JOSEF FEDERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate begins final push to expand Social Security benefits for millions of people
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Senate is pushing toward a vote on legislation that would provide full Social Security benefits to millions of people, setting up potential passage in the final days of the lame-duck Congress. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RFK Jr.'s daughter-in-law met with Ratcliffe about CIA job: Washington Post
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s daughter-in-law took a private meeting with John Ratcliffe, President-elect Trump’s pick to run the CIA, in an apparent bid for a high-ranking position within the agency, The Washington Post reported.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump invites China's Xi to next month's inauguration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is breaking with precedent in inviting a foreign head of state to his inauguration.
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram, MPR News

item.title: Hill to chair House Financial Services Committee, Walberg to lead Education and Workforce panel
item.description: House Republican leaders on Thursday choose Rep. French Hill (R-Ark.) to lead the House Financial Services Committee in the 119th Congress and Rep. Tim Walberg (R-Mich.) to chair the House Committee on Education and the Workforce, completing their selections for committee chairs.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-FBI informant accused of lying about Bidens agrees to plead guilty to federal charges
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A former FBI informant accused of falsely claiming that President Joe Biden and his son Hunter accepted bribes has agreed to plead guilty to federal charges, according to court papers filed Thursday.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: RFK Jr. wants daughter-in-law in CIA top role to probe JFK assassination
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. reportedly wants Amaryllis Fox Kennedy and Trump to help release documents about the JFK assassination.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Shafer, NewsNation

item.title: Lawmakers edge closer to deal on government funding
item.description: Lawmakers say they are edging closer to a deal to keep the government's lights on in nine days but are still trying to work out differences over disaster aid and potential add-ons to the bill. There’s some optimism in the Capitol that bill text could arrive as soon as this weekend as the Dec.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Future of Democratic Party rest in hands of one of these candidates
item.description: While the average American may not know who the chair of the Democratic National Committee is, the role has a direct impact on their lives.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Koppell, NewsNation

item.title: Q&A: Ben Wikler running for DNC chair
item.description: Ben Wikler is chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and candidate for chair of the Democratic National Committee.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Koppell, NewsNation

item.title: Bidders are back in court battling over the auction of Alex Jones' Infowars
item.description: A U.S. bankruptcy judge is hearing arguments for and against selling the show to The Onion, the satirical news site named the winning bidder. Host Alex Jones says the auction was rigged.
item.dc:creator: Tovia Smith, MPR News

item.title: Social Security beneficiaries at risk of delays amid GOP funding fight
item.description: Social Security beneficiaries could face longer wait times for service next year unless Congress agrees to the White House budget office’s request to increase funding for the Social Security Administration (SSA), the administration that runs the program is warning.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Lara Trump stepping down from RNC amid Senate speculation
item.description: Lara Trump is stepping down as co-chair of the Republican National Committee (RNC) as she considers replacing Florida Sen. Marco Rubio (R), whom her father-in-law, President-elect Donald Trump, picked to be secretary of State.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5
